errors.name: InvalidArgs
errors.msg: Settlement attestation args could not be decoded.

errors.name: NotVestingAsset
errors.msg: Settlement attestation only applies to vesting assets.

errors.name: InvalidSettlementMode
errors.msg: Listing is missing a supported settlement mode.

errors.name: MissingRequiredSettlementAttestor
errors.msg: This listing is missing a required settlement attestor.

errors.name: UnauthorizedAttestor
errors.msg: The apply authority does not match the listing's required settlement attestor.

errors.name: PrivateBuyerMismatch
errors.msg: This private listing is reserved for a different buyer.

errors.name: InvalidSettlementProofId
errors.msg: Settlement proof id pubkey is invalid.

errors.name: MissingSettlementProofId
errors.msg: Settlement proof id cannot be empty.

errors.name: InvalidSettlementExpiry
errors.msg: Settlement approval must expire in the future.

errors.name: UnauthorizedByPolicy
errors.msg: Settlement attestor is not currently allowed by policy.

errors.name: TimestampRequired
errors.msg: A valid current timestamp is required (must be > 0).

types.name: VestingSettlementAttested
docs: Event emitted when a vesting settlement is attested (I-2).
